title: Runtime Configuration, Secrets, Environment Precedence, and Sensitive Data · Delivery Case: Docker Compose Secrets Configs
summary: A service must receive database credentials and rotation-safe settings without baking them into images, logs, history, or source control. Planned artifact: Add and verify the docker compose secrets configs increment in configuration and secret-flow contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Grant only named services access to declared secrets and configs and verify file path, permissions, rotation, and local Compose limitations.
Resolve CLI, Compose, env_file, image, shell, quoting, unset, empty, required, default, and literal-dollar environment behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example build receives credentials through ARG and ENV; Compose interpolation prints them; image history and logs retain copies. Classify public config, build secrets, runtime secrets, redaction, and rotation. Competency probe: Grant only named services access to declared secrets and configs and verify file path, permissions, rotation, and local Compose limitations. A defensible solution applies Docker Compose Secrets Configs, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to configuration and secret-flow contract.

content.code:
# Evidence: docker-worked-docker-config-secrets-environment-5
  - competency: docker-worked-docker-config-secrets-environment-5
    artifact: configuration-boundary.yaml
    decision: worked docker config secrets environment 5
    scenario-variant: 4
    environment: ephemeral development host with constrained disk and memory
    fault-injection: rebuild after the approved base digest is withdrawn
    retained-proof: accessible recovery runbook with rollback rehearsal timing
    case-key: worked5
    change: |
      public-config: immutable-environment-map
      runtime-secret: mounted-file
      build-secret: buildkit-secret-mount
      logs: redact-values
      rotation: restart-with-versioned-reference
    verify: docker compose config --environment && docker image history --no-trunc candidate
    failure: Reject secrets in Dockerfile ENV, ARG, Compose interpolation output, image history, repository files, or diagnostic logs.
    repair: Separate public config from secrets, inject each at the narrowest lifetime, scan metadata, rotate the credential, and verify redaction.
content.caption: Runnable Docker artifact and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Compose secrets are encrypted at rest and dynamically rotated in every implementation. This fails the Docker Compose Secrets Configs contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
